subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. 1913, from Mahmud's diary
subcodes.first_line: Man's duty is to persevere and struggle, and to hope for God's help. Not for him to sit idly by, proud and unconcerned.
subcodes.subjects: @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @effort; striving, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @piety; righteousness; fear of God [taqwa]
